message:
fix(clippy): resolve redundant_pub_crate and unused imports in workflow submodules

- account_steps.rs: pub(crate) → pub for 5 functions (private module)
- codex_exit.rs: pub(crate) → pub for 6 functions (private module)
- coordination.rs: pub(crate) → pub for 4 items, remove 3 unused imports,
  add Default impl for TextScanPatterns, allow implicit_hasher
- descriptors.rs: pub(crate) → pub for 2 constants (private module)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
